reason: Pre-rotation seeder wallets (gemini/deepseek/qwen) carried on-chain reputation 0.61-0.69, below the TranslationAuction 0.7 submitBid gate, and the W14-C EMA decay bug prevented recovery. Rotated to -v2 slot names so deterministic wallet derivation yields fresh addresses starting at reputation 1.0.

verify_chain_consistency_phase_2_result: PASS_ON_CHAIN_settled=True (DB-vs-chain winner mismatch is a separate orchestrator issue: chain picks highest bid, DB recorded lowest)

reputation_after_3_failed_events.note: Already below the 0.7 gate again after 3 failed lifecycles (no quality_passes recorded). The W14-C EMA bug means the v2 rotation buys ~3 live events before another rotation will be needed. Permanent fix lives in W14-CONTRACT-PREP.
